raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs gribbam ta patt
buht/ ka zittas Tautas/ un muh-
fu Kehnixam buhs muhs teesahft/
un tam buhs muhsu Preekfcha â
iseet/ kad mehs Karrâ eetam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Samuels wiffus
fchohs Lauschu Wahrdus bij dsir-
dejs/ afsazzija wiꞥſch tohs tam
KUNGAH.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KURGS
ns Samueu : paclanit winnu
Balkfnei/ uneezell pahr teem wee-
nu Kehnixu. Tad fazzija Sa-
maels us Israêta Landim : Eita
tkatrs fawa Pilssahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N weens Wihrs bija no
Benjamixa/ Kis Wahr-
da/ weens Dehls Abte-
ta/ ta Dehla Zerora / ta Dehla
Bekora/ ta Dehla Aptja/ weena
Wihra Dehls no Jemini/ tag
pats Wihrs Jemini/ bija weens
warrens stips Wihrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnam bija tweens
Dehls ar Wahrdn Sauls/ weens
skaists un labs Jaunefftis / un
tahda skaista Wihra ne bija starp
Israêta Behrneem ka wiꞥſch /
wiffu Galwu leelaks/ ne ka wiffi
zitti Landis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu bija Saula Tehwan
Rifam tahs Ehseta-Mahtes sud-
dufchas/ tapehz fazzija Kis us
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fatou Dehlu Sauhu : Nemmi je-
le weenu no teem Puifscheem a
tew lihdzi / un zellees / etj tah
Ehseta-Mahtes mekleht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pahrstaigaja winsc
tohs Eewrâima Kalnus/ un gah-
zaur Salifa Semuni / un ne a-
radde tahs/ pehz gahje tee zaur t
Semmt Sadim/ ir tur ne btja-
tad gahje tee zaur to Semmt J
mini/ tur arri ne atradde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze tee us to Sem-
mi Juw/ un Sauls fazzija u
fawu Puifi/ kas pee winna bija
Nahz/ eima atpakat/ ka ne j-
schu mans Tehivs no tahni Eh-
ta-Mahtehn mittejahs / un fal-
preefsch mums ruhpetees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet schis fazzija us to
Redst jelle/ schinni Pilssahta i
weens Deewa Wihrs / un ta-
Wihrs tohp Zeenâ Gohdâ tu-
rehts/ wifs/ ko wiꞥſch runna/ te-
teefcham arri noteek/ eima nu-
turren/ jaschu wiꞥſch mums sta-
stihg muhsu Zettu / fur mum-
ja-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls us t-
wu Puifi: Bet redsi / kad mel-
eesim/ ko mehs tahm Wihrarn ne-
fisim / jo Maises newa wa-
eekch muhfahn Kullitehm / u-
muns Dahwanu newa ta-
Deewa Wihrarn nest: Kas ta-
muns irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Puifs atbild-
Saulam attat/ un fazzija: Ra-
ai/ manna Rohkâ irr ta zetto-
Teefa no weena Sudraba S-
keta/ to dohfschu es taim Dee-
Wi-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
